name: purpose-atlas-preview
description: Purpose Decision Atlas v6 preview app package boundary.

scripts.build: npm run sync:fixtures && vite build && python3 scripts/build_standalone.py
scripts.test: node --check scripts/sync-fixtures.mjs && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/runtime/atlas-runtime.js && node --check src/a2ui/apis.js && node --check src/a2ui/catalog.js && node --check src/a2ui/validate-messages.js && node --check src/components/a2ui-sdui-surface.js && node --check src/components/atlas-source-surface.js && node --check src/ui/cached-atlas-renderer.js && node --check src/domain/atlas-engine.js
